title: Health and Safety at Work Act 2015 (New Zealand)
description: New Zealand legislation establishing comprehensive health and safety obligations for persons conducting a business or undertaking (PCBUs), officers, and workers. Covers duty of care, worker participation, hazard management, enforcement mechanisms, and liability frameworks applicable to workplace operations.

source.page_title: Health and Safety at Work Act 2015 | New Zealand Legislation
